result.stdout:
EventHorizon.Blazor.TypeScript.Interop.Tool:
  Generate a Blazor Wasm or Server project from TypeScript definition files.

Usage:
  EventHorizon.Blazor.TypeScript.Interop.Tool [options]

Options:
  -s, --source <source> (REQUIRED)                                   TypeScript Definition to generate from, can be a File or URL, accepts multiple or as Array
  -c, --class-to-generate <class-to-generate> (REQUIRED)             A Class to generate, accepts multiple or as Array
  -a, --project-assembly <project-assembly>                          The project name of the Assembly that will be generated [default: Generated.Code]
  -l, --project-generation-location <project-generation-location>    The directory where the Generated Project assembly will be saved [default: _generated]
  -f, --force                                                        This will force generation, by deleting --project-generation-location [default: False]
  -p, --parser <parser>                                              The type of TypeScript parser to use, 'dotnet' will use the embedded .NET parser. 'nodejs' will use the TypeScript compiler through NodeJS (requires NodeJS installed). [default: dotnet]
  -h, --host-type <host-type>                                        The host type the source should be generator for. Is 'wasm' by default, will only work for Wasm hosted Blazor projects. Supports 'server' to generate a async first interop layer that works in both Blazor Server and Wasm hosted models. [default: wasm]
  --version                                                          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                     Show help and usage information

  Generate a Blazor Wasm or Server project from TypeScript definition files.

Usage:
  EventHorizon.Blazor.TypeScript.Interop.Tool [options]

  -c, --class-to-generate <class-to-generate> (REQUIRED)             A Class to generate, accepts multiple or as Array
  -a, --project-assembly <project-assembly>                          The project name of the Assembly that will be generated [default: Generated.Code]

  -p, --parser <parser>                                              The type of TypeScript parser to use, 'dotnet' will use the embedded .NET parser. 'nodejs' will use the TypeScript compiler through NodeJS (requires NodeJS installed). [default: dotnet]
  -h, --host-type <host-type>                                        The host type the source should be generator for. Is 'wasm' by default, will only work for Wasm hosted Blazor projects. Supports 'server' to generate a async first interop layer that works in both Blazor Server and Wasm hosted models. [default: wasm]
  --version                                                          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                     Show help and usage information
